current.headline: How you process the game
current.summary: Competitive drive is the edge; the growth lever is faster reset after mistakes.

domains.name: Composure
domains.summary: How steady you stay when the moment gets big.

domains.name: Focus
domains.summary: How well you lock in pitch to pitch.

domains.name: Resilience
domains.summary: How fast you bounce back after a mistake.

domains.name: Confidence
domains.summary: How much you trust your game in big counts.

domains.name: Competitive Drive
domains.summary: How much you want the ball when it matters.
